source_title: Official Destiny EV-30 Tumbler Sparrow Trailer
source_description: The EV-30 Tumbler Sparrow is a thrilling personal vehicle included with Destiny Expansion I: The Dark Below. Buy the Destiny Expansion Pass: http://www.destinythegame.com/wheretobuy?bundle=expansionPass Guardians who purchase and redeem Destiny Expansion Pass or Destiny Expansion I: The Dark Below by January 15, 2015 will receive the EV-30 Tumbler Sparrow, enabling its riders to drive fast, take flight, and perform a set of mid-air tricks. Guardians who have already purchased or will purchase and redeem Destiny Expansion Pass will receive the EV-30 Tumbler Sparrow from the in-game Postmaster at the time of redemption. Guardians who have already purchased or will purchase and redeem Destiny Expansion I: The Dark Below will receive the EV-30 Tumbler Sparrow from the in-game Postmaster starting on December 9, 2014.

This fall, on September 17th, Guardians will return to our moon – twisted, reshaped, and haunted by our past – to confront new threats and uncover new additions to their customized arsenal. title: O Brave New World
description: Game-focused documentary/montage piece, likely combining gameplay, developer/story context, and promotional pacing. Title was recovered from video-provider metadata rather than portfolio caption.
source_title: O Brave New World
source_description: To cap off Bungie's 20th Anniversary festivities, the team has assembled a near hour long documentary covering the studio's past, present, and future. Featuring insight from the team -- including their ever illusive Creative Director, Jason Jones -- and interviews from key industry veterans and luminaries, \"O Brave New World\" is both a celebration of Bungie's legacy and a love letter to the community of gamers who have embraced Bungie's games for two incredible decades.

author: Millennium Entertainment
title: "Danika" Theatrical Trailer
description: Promotional trailer/teaser built to quickly introduce the title, event, character, feature, or mood.
source_title: Danika - Trailer
source_description: Danika Merrick — a young mother of three — has a caring husband, a beautiful house, and a safe, simple life. She does her best to shield her family from a world filled with fears. But despite all of her good intentions, Danika's worries over everyday dangers begin to manifest themselves into strange delusions of horrific proportions. With the belief that she is going insane, Danika seeks psychiatric help. ...But what happens when her gruesome hallucinations start becoming a reality? Danika is a psychological suspense thriller, filled with mind bending twists and turns, which proves the more we try to control our fears, the more our fears control us. MPAA Rating: R for violence, language, some sexual content and a scene of drug use. Cast: Marisa Tomei, Hannah Marks and Guy Camilleri
